## Summary

Describe the change in a few lines.

## Linked issue

Closes #...

Use `Closes`, `Fixes`, or `Resolves` only when this MR/PR fully completes the issue.

Use `Refs`, `Related to`, or `Part of` when this MR/PR is partial.

## Changes

- ...

## Files changed

- `...`

## Tests run

```bash
make validate
make lint
make test
```

## Results

Describe the command results. If a command could not run, explain why.

## Impact KPI

- ...

## Figures / diagrams

- [ ] no figure added
- [ ] Mermaid figure added
- [ ] Python-generated image added
- [ ] temporary generation files removed
- [ ] figure is referenced by documentation or paper content

## Risks / limits

- ...

## Checklist

- [ ] MR/PR small and focused
- [ ] linked issue is present
- [ ] no invented issue number
- [ ] no out-of-scope change
- [ ] no opportunistic refactor
- [ ] tests added or updated if required
- [ ] documentation updated if required
- [ ] no secret
- [ ] no private data
- [ ] no unapproved external image
- [ ] diagrams are Mermaid or images generated by Python
- [ ] closing keyword matches issue completion status
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] approval received before merge
